_comment: Verified 2026-07-01. Input is contenteditable div#ask-input[role='textbox']. Send button is button[aria-label='Submit'] (only enabled when text typed). Stop button button[aria-label='Stop response (Esc)'] appears during generation (web search + answer) and disappears on completion — primary completion indicator. Response container is div#markdown-content-0 (clean answer text). Fallback to div.prose.dark:prose-invert.
